entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency derivatives exchange providing perpetual futures, options, spot markets, order-book trading, margin and position management, wallet operations, and REST and WebSocket API access.
entity.notes: Current first-party site and API documentation support active exchange classification. HEI uses Global as an origin bucket because Delta Exchange exposes distinct India and Global environments and this initial record does not collapse their legal/regional boundaries into a single national origin. Confidence is medium pending deeper legal-entity and historical launch reconstruction.

evidence.title: About Delta Exchange
evidence.notes: First-party About page identifies Delta Exchange as a cryptocurrency derivatives exchange serving retail and institutional traders and describes the current founding and executive team.

evidence.title: Delta Exchange API Documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party API documentation covers products, tickers, option chains, order placement and cancellation, positions, fills, L2 order books, public trades, wallet balances and transactions, volume statistics, REST clients, WebSocket feeds, and a changelog extending into June 2026.

evidence.title: Delta Exchange current CCXT integration
evidence.notes: Current CCXT master integration identifies Delta Exchange and implements spot, perpetual swap, and options market support together with markets, order books, trades, orders, balances, positions, deposit addresses, and official Delta Exchange API and documentation URLs.
